query: SELECT u.id, u.open_id, u.name, u.email, s.id as sub_id, s.user_id as sub_user_id, s.stripe_customer_id, s.stripe_subscription_id, s.status as sub_status FROM users u LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON u.id = s.user_id ORDER BY u.id;
